evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributed 20 trades and $1227.30 with no slow >=12h trades, but average MAE was -123.94 and prior breakout_long_1dte tightening reduced score and net profit. A companion route is a different mechanism from stricter breakout gates.
name: 1DTE Pullback Companion
risk: The added router profile may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades if router ordering or profile matching is broader than expected.
trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state looks more like pullback/reclaim than breakout continuation.
validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains at least current $1227.30, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.94, and breakout_long_1dte PnL is not materially cannibalized.

evidence: pullback_long produced $2413.20 but owns worst MAE -638.75; broad structure pruning would retain only 71.6% PnL and leave worst MAE unchanged, so profile splitting is preferable to global or parent-profile tightening.
name: Pullback Deep-Heat Split
risk: Current config keys may not express the deep-heat state without blocking protected profitable weak-structure pullbacks.
trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback entries with weak structure distances, low VWAP acceleration, near-zero early MFE diagnostics, and delayed TP behavior.
validation_metric: Retain at least 90% of pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -638.75 toward <= -527 and improving combined PnL/exposure hour.
